name: composition-prover
description: A simple web interface for Richard Smith's GSiril touch proving program.

scripts.build:css: mkdir -p web && postcss src/css/style.css -o web/style.css --use postcss-nesting --use autoprefixer --use postcss-csso
scripts.build:js:app: mkdir -p web && rollup src/js/app.js --file web/app.js --format iife --name app --plugin @rollup/plugin-node-resolve --compact && terser web/app.js --compress toplevel=true,pure_getters=true,unsafe=true,passes=3 --mangle --keep-fnames -o web/app.js
scripts.build:js:serviceworker: mkdir -p web && cp src/js/service-worker.js web/service-worker.js && sed -i "s/compositionprover-DATE/compositionprover-$(date -u +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)/g" web/service-worker.js && terser web/service-worker.js -o web/service-worker.js
scripts.build:html: mkdir -p web && cp src/html/index.html web/index.html && html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments -o web/index.html web/index.html
scripts.build:img: mkdir -p web && svgo -f src/img -o web && cp src/img/*.png web/
scripts.build:favicon: mkdir -p web && cp src/img/favicon.ico src/img/favicon.svg web/
scripts.build: npm-run-all build:css build:js build:html build:img build:favicon build:manifest
